name: ophthalmic-infographic-creator
description: Ophthalmic Infographic Creator with Knowledge Base and FTP Server

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync
scripts.android:debug: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync android && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/Users/mahmoudsami/.local/jdks/temurin-21/Contents/Home ANDROID_HOME=/Users/mahmoudsami/Library/Android/sdk ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/Users/mahmoudsami/Library/Android/sdk ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:bundle: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync android && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/Users/mahmoudsami/.local/jdks/temurin-21/Contents/Home ANDROID_HOME=/Users/mahmoudsami/Library/Android/sdk ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/Users/mahmoudsami/Library/Android/sdk ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
